name: Coconut Cup Cake with Guava Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk, butter, sugar, and coconut syrup together.
2. Sift the cake flour, baking powder, and salt into a separate bowl.
3. Stir the sifted dry ingredients into the scalded milk mixture until well combined.
4. Whip the egg whites until they form foam. Gradually add the cream of tartar and continue whipping until stiff peaks form but are not dry.
5. Gently fold the whipped egg white mixture into the batter.
6. Grease a muffin tin and pour the batter into each cavity.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 10 to 12 minutes, or until set.
8. Makes 12 medium-sized cupcakes.
9. Top with Guava Frosting.
Submitted by: Liana Brown
